description: A fire breaks out on a vessel at berth. The harbormaster orders an emergency unmooring to move the vessel away from the quay.

nodes.task_description: Receive the emergency order from the harbormaster to cast off the vessel immediately.

expected_outcome.value: The mooring gang supervisor receives the urgent command.

nodes.task_description: Use emergency release hooks or, if necessary, cut the mooring lines to free the vessel.

expected_outcome.value: The mooring lines are released as quickly as possible.

nodes.task_description: Confirm to the tugboats and pilot that the vessel is free so it can be towed away from the berth to a safe location.

expected_outcome.value: The supervisor confirms 'all lines gone' so the emergency towage can begin.
